violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by boxes. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Boxes were removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 25 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Call for service was placed during the time of inspection. Establishment is to sanitize all dishes and utensils in the sanitizing basin of the 3-bay sink until unit is repaired. Chlorine sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was observed at 100ppm during the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Food was relocated at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of various dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Bowls were removed during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 3-door low and the prep unit in the kitchen area. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the wok cookline and ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by boxes. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Boxes were removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils knives were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Knives were cleaned at the time of inspection Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Food was relocated at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

Knives were observed being stored in between the prep unit and table. Knives were moved to 3-bay sink at the time of inspection. Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils were removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023

The cutting board in the kitchen is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the low boy coolers and prep unit. New Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the gaskets on the low boy coolers and have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
Their are ceiling tiles in the establishment in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2024
